pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Gunnar, "Bubba G," you and those Senegalese Lions better roar like it's 1994, because your top spot is as precarious as a one-legged man in an ass-kicking contest.** Look, let me tell you something, Devin, "Ghost Pepper," you're already feeling the heat because that loyal Spanish armada of yours obliterated Saudi Arabia, yet you’re hanging in there at number four like a faded World Cup sticker. Now, Norway, led by your highly questionable drafting strategy, takes on Gunner's Senegal — a team with more flair and potential than your entire fantasy roster could ever dream of achieving. Both of you listen up: If you think this is a mere game, think again. This is a battle for your sporting soul, and I predict Gunner’s Senegalese warriors will overrun Devin’s Norwegian hopefuls like a '94 World Cup flashback — expect a demolition. When the dust settles, mustering anything less than a full-on battle will be a moral failure as grim as Gayden’s last-place disgrace, sitting pretty with his paltry 13 points. If Bubba G can’t make the magic happen here, maybe this fantasy pool just isn’t his game. Mic drop, and mark my words!

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Zach Predicted To Stir Up No Surprise Against Argentina
pundit_takes.subtitle: 'Austria is always ready to be an underdog', says nobody ever.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Gunner's France Set For A Leisurely Stroll Versus Iraq
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner's draft strategy: win against teams not in the pool.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin Might Be Too Spicy For Bubba G's Senegal
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin banking on Norway to bring the heat against Gunner's pick.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Gayden Poised To Confuse With Jordan Against Algeria
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's plan: complex tactics with a team nobody remembers.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's 15 and tied for second? Someone check if they swapped him with Rain Man.
Rafe drafted the Three Stooges of soccer nations and still somehow competes.
Gayden's 15-year-old son Rafe is all square with the old man. Thanksgiving's awkward!
Sim can't process teenage chaos; Rafe's defying odds like he's Neo in The Matrix.
